victim.value: Friend named Ferb killed by police while walking to a bar
victim.quote: they killed my friend Ferb. He was a nice friend. I can't believe how they killed him.

closed_world.value: Killer Lane town with 14 remaining residents under police control
closed_world.quote: only 14 people live here now because all the people kept stealing 4 loaves each day

culprit_and_motive.value: Stone Running police killing residents for minor crimes like bread theft
culprit_and_motive.quote: The Stone Running police killed with a dead ray gun. It is a deadly weapon.

resolution.value: Springfield destroys Killer Lane and kills all the police
resolution.quote: Springfield blew up the whole part of Killer Lane And killed all the police.

social_world.value: Authoritarian police state with extreme punishment for minor crimes, creating terror-based social control
social_world.quote: The police Has strangled over 400 people. That is why you call our town Killer Lane.

media_and_audience.value: Town reputation as dangerous place spreads through word-of-mouth testimonials and survivor accounts
media_and_audience.quote: One of my friends visited it. And got killed in it
